tasks.subject: Task 1: Schema migration + pure helpers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `id` + `relevance_required_all` to the registry and add the pure helper functions the rest of the plan depends on.

**Files:** data/watches.json, watch_monitor.py, tests/test_tagging.py

**Verify:** python3 -m pytest tests/test_tagging.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["watch_monitor.py", "tests/test_tagging.py", "data/watches.json"], "verifyCommand": "python3 -m pytest tests/test_tagging.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["slugify returns expected slug", "size_signals returns size strings", "tag_deal preferred_signals from size_mm", "watches.json migrated with id + relevance_required_all"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Config-driven search, relevance, and push
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Drive searching, relevance filtering, and the hot flag entirely from the registry; delete the global config constants.

**Files:** watch_monitor.py, tests/test_tagging.py

**Verify:** python3 -m pytest tests/test_tagging.py -v && python3 -c 'import watch_monitor'

```json:metadata
{"files": ["watch_monitor.py", "tests/test_tagging.py"], "verifyCommand": "python3 -m pytest tests/test_tagging.py -v && python3 -c 'import watch_monitor'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["is_relevant takes groups arg", "search functions registry-driven", "push_ntfy uses is_hot/preferred_signals", "globals + preferred_hits removed", "main loads registry before search"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Flask CRUD API for the watch registry
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add validated create/update/delete routes for `watches.json` with atomic writes.

**Files:** webapp/flask/app.py, webapp/flask/tests/test_app.py

**Verify:** python3 -m pytest webapp/flask/tests/test_app.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["webapp/flask/app.py", "webapp/flask/tests/test_app.py"], "verifyCommand": "python3 -m pytest webapp/flask/tests/test_app.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["POST valid 201 with slug id", "POST missing field 400", "POST no valid ref 400", "POST duplicate 409", "PUT updates / 404 unknown", "DELETE removes / 404 unknown", "relevance auto-derived default", "atomic write"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Flask git status + push-to-activate routes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expose whether `watches.json` has unsaved/unpushed changes and a route to commit+push it.

**Files:** webapp/flask/app.py, webapp/flask/tests/test_app.py

**Verify:** python3 -m pytest webapp/flask/tests/test_app.py -k 'status or push' -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["webapp/flask/app.py", "webapp/flask/tests/test_app.py"], "verifyCommand": "python3 -m pytest webapp/flask/tests/test_app.py -k 'status or push' -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GET status returns dirty/ahead/needs_push", "POST push success ok true", "POST push failure 500 ok false", "status degrades safely on git error"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Watches view — nav, list, form, push banner
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a browser UI to view/add/edit/delete watches and push changes, in the existing Flask single-page app.

**Files:** webapp/flask/templates/index.html, webapp/flask/static/app.js, webapp/flask/static/style.css

**Verify:** python3 -m pytest webapp/flask/tests/test_app.py -v (plus manual browser check)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["webapp/flask/templates/index.html", "webapp/flask/static/app.js", "webapp/flask/static/style.css"], "verifyCommand": "python3 -m pytest webapp/flask/tests/test_app.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["nav toggle deals/watches", "list with edit/delete", "add/edit form with required refs + advanced", "POST/PUT save with inline errors", "push banner with activate button", "banner reflects status on load"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
